rulings.Case Title: GEORGE SEAY VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al***CASE TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY***

rulings.Case Title: ROBIN HAMILTON et al VS. GERALD M MURPHY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motionto Strike Portions Of Pltfs' First Amended Complaint; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 4, 2007, LINE 3 DEFENDANT GERALD MURPHY, MILTON JACOBS, RICHARD SPOTSWOOD, JACOBS SPOTSWOOD CASPER & MURPHY A LAW PARTNERSHIP, DONALD CASPER'S Notice Of Motion And Motion to Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint; Request For Judicial Notice IS CONTINUED TO 5/18/07 TO ENABLE INTESSA CORPORATION TO OBTAIN A CERTIFICATE OF REVIVOR PER COLOR-VUE INC. V. ABRAMS (1996) 44 CAL.APP.4TH 1599, 1606. =(302/PJM/PM)

rulings.Case Title: ROBIN HAMILTON et al VS. GERALD M MURPHY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 4, 2007, LINE 3 DEFENDANT GERALD MURPHY, MILTON JACOBS, RICHARD SPOTSWOOD, JACOBS SPOTSWOOD CASPER & MURPHY A LAW PARTNERSHIP, DONALD CASPER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS TO PLEAD FACTS DEMONSTRATING HOW THEY CAN BE LIABLE AS INDIVIDUALS. CONTINUE AS TO INTESSA CORPORATION TO 5/18/07 TO ENABLE TO ENABLE INTESSA TO OBTAIN A CERTIFICATE OF REVIVOR. =(302/PJM/PB)

SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 4, 2007, LINE 6 PLAINTIFF RMC CONSTRUCTIONS' MOTION TO AMEND/MODIFY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT CALLAHAN PARTICIPATED IN AND/OR CONTROLLED THE LITIGATION THAT GAVE RISE TO THE JUDGMENT AS REQUIRED BY NEC ELECTRONICS INC. V. HURT (1989) 208 CAL.APP.3RD 772, 781. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: HECTOR REYNAGA et al VS. MARY-ANN WARMERDAM
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc Of Hearing On Petitioners' Req. For Writ Of Mandate And Declaratory Relief
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 4, 2007, LINE 4 PETITIONER HECTOR REYNAGA, BENITO HERNANDEZ' Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners' Request. For Writ Of Mandate And Declaratory Relief. THE WRIT OF MANDATE IS GRANTED. THE DECLARATION OF OCTOBER 4, 2006 OF AN AGRICULTURAL EMERGENCY WAS AN ABUSE OF DISCRETION. HEARING REQUIRED ON ANY FURTHER RELIEF SOUGHT BY PLAINTIFFS. =(302/PJM/KD)
